gaps.description: src/detector/profiles.js missing — remote fetch + local cache not implemented; matcher.js only covers matching logic
src/runtime/llm.js missing — chat(messages, options) → stream not implemented
src/runtime/stt.js missing — transcribe(audioBuffer) → text not implemented
src/runtime/tts.js missing — synthesize(text) → audioBuffer not implemented
src/runtime/sense.js missing — MediaPipe sense wrapper not implemented
src/runtime/memory.js missing — KV store wrapper not implemented
src/server/hub.js missing — device management not implemented
src/server/brain.js missing — LLM inference + tool call handler not implemented
src/server/api.js missing — all REST endpoints (POST /api/chat, /api/transcribe, /api/synthesize, GET /api/status, /api/config, PUT /api/config) not implemented
src/ui/admin/ missing — admin panel not implemented
profiles/default.json missing — built-in default profile config absent
install/ directory missing — setup.sh, Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml all absent
